section.small: estimation from 530kb of code in 190 edited files across 71 commits

div.span: Assertive Logicians are Introverted, Intuitive, Thinking, Prospecting and Assertive. Logicians are innovative inventors with an unquenchable thirst for knowledge. These flexible thinkers enjoy approaching life unconventionally, often seeking out unlikely paths.
Likely prefers fewer, yet deep and meaningful, social interactions and feels drawn to calmer environments.
Likely very imaginative and open-minded, focusing on hidden meanings and distant possibilities.
Likely focuses on objectivity and rationality, putting effectiveness above social harmony.
Likely very good at improvising and adapting. Tends to be flexible and values novelty above stability.
Likely self-assured, even-tempered, and resistant to stress, refusing to worry too much.
